tooltip_take_damage: External effect (any time). Damage minus Toughness = margin.
tooltip_margin: Damage minus Toughness. 0 = Shaken only. Every full 4 = one wound (raise).
tooltip_soak: Wounds negated by spending a Benny + Vigor roll. Each success/raise removes 1 wound. If all wounds soaked, also clears Shaken.
tooltip_incap_roll: Vigor roll at the moment of becoming incapacitated. Only used if this hit pushes wounds past max. -1 = crit fail (dead). 0 = fail (bleeding out). 1+ = success (stable with injury).
tooltip_injury_roll: Injury Table roll: tableRoll*10 + subRoll. E.g. 52 = table 5, sub 2. Only used on incapacitation. 0 = no injury.
tooltip_start_of_turn: Start of character's turn. Automatic free checks: Vigor (stunned, bleeding out), Spirit (shaken).
tooltip_vigor_roll: Vigor check result. Used for Stunned recovery and Bleeding Out. 0 = fail. 1 = success. 2+ = raise.
tooltip_spirit_roll: Spirit check result. Used for Shaken recovery. 0 = fail. 1 = success. 2+ = raise.
tooltip_spend_benny: Spend a Benny to immediately remove Shaken (any time, even on others' turns).
tooltip_defend: Full Defense: +4 Parry. Uses whole turn — no multi-actions. Can move at Pace, no running. Lasts until start of next turn.
tooltip_on_hold: On Hold. Act voluntarily or interrupt another's action.
tooltip_act_from_hold: Voluntarily leave hold and take your turn (no Athletics check needed).
tooltip_interrupt: Reaction (on hold). Opposed Athletics check to interrupt another's action.
tooltip_athletics_roll: Athletics roll to interrupt. 0 = fail (act after interruptee). 1+ = success (act before interruptee).
tooltip_escape_attempt: Action (on your turn). Strength (-2) or Athletics check.
tooltip_escape_roll: Escape roll. From entangled: 1+ = free. From bound: 1 = entangled, 2+ = free.
tooltip_grapple: Action (on your turn). Opposed Athletics check. Escape is also an action.
tooltip_heal: Action (on your turn). Healing skill (within Golden Hour) or natural healing.
tooltip_heal_amount: Number of wounds healed (1-3). Healing while incapacitated also removes incapacitation.
tooltip_fear_check: Free action (any time). Spirit check when encountering a source of fear.
tooltip_fear_modifier: Modifier to Fear Table roll (e.g. +2 for Terror).
tooltip_affliction: External effect (poisons, diseases, powers). Effects applied at start of character's turn.
tooltip_affliction_duration: Number of turns the affliction lasts.
tooltip_power_effects: Action (on your turn). Power activation; duration in rounds. Backlash removes all effects + fatigue.
tooltip_power_duration: Number of rounds the effect lasts.
tooltip_penalty: Cumulative penalty to all trait rolls from Wounds (max -3) and Fatigue levels.
tooltip_defending: Full Defense: +4 Parry, uses whole turn, lasts until next turn
tooltip_injury_penalty: Number of die-reducing injuries (Guts/Head Brain Damage)
affliction_weak: Weak (+1 fatigue at start of turn)
affliction_lethal: Lethal (+fatigue, shaken, wound at start of turn)
log_tooltip_undo: Undo — roll back to previous event
log_tooltip_clear: Clear log and reset to fresh state
tooltip_stable: Incapacitated with injury. Injury Table roll not modeled — lookup is external.
tooltip_bleeding_out: Dying. Vigor roll each turn: fail = dead, raise = stabilized. Injury Table roll not modeled.
status_shaken_effects: Free actions and movement only. Parry unaffected.
status_shaken_removal: Spirit check at start of turn. Benny = instant.
status_stunned_effects: Distracted and Vulnerable. Falls prone. Cannot act.
status_stunned_removal: Vigor at start of turn. Success = Vulnerable until end of next turn.
status_distracted_cause: Tests, magic, creature abilities; side effect of Stunned.
status_distracted_removal: At the end of your next turn.
status_vulnerable_cause: Tests, magic, creature abilities; side effect of Stunned.
status_vulnerable_effects: Enemies get +2 to all rolls against the character.
status_vulnerable_removal: At the end of your next turn.
status_wounded_cause: Each raise on the damage roll (every 4 over Toughness).
status_wounded_effects: -1 per wound (max -3) to trait rolls and Pace.
status_wounded_removal: Healing (within Golden Hour) or natural healing (5 days).
status_incapacitated_cause: Wounds exceed max; fatigue past Exhausted.
status_incapacitated_effects: Cannot act. May be bleeding out (Vigor check each turn).
status_fatigued_cause: Hazards, stress, arcane powers, hunger, thirst.
status_fatigued_removal: One hour of rest (or remove cause).
status_exhausted_cause: Fatigued character gains another fatigue level.
status_exhausted_removal: One hour of rest (or remove cause).
status_prone_effects: Ranged attacks -4 (from 3+ inches). Melee: -2 Fighting, -2 Parry.
status_on_hold_cause: Character chooses to wait, not acting on their turn.
status_on_hold_removal: Using turn / interrupting. Shaken or Stunned removes it.
status_bound_effects: Cannot move. Distracted and Vulnerable. Can only attempt escape.
status_grabbed_cause: Success on opposed Athletics during grapple.
status_pinned_cause: Raise on grapple; repeated grapple on grabbed target.
status_pinned_effects: Cannot move. Distracted and Vulnerable. Can only attempt escape.
status_blinded_effects: Impaired (-2) or Blinded (-4) to all sight-related rolls.
status_blinded_removal: Vigor at start of turn: raise = remove, success = reduce by one step.
status_defending_cause: Voluntarily: character spends whole turn defending.
status_defending_effects: +4 to Parry. Can move (Pace) but cannot run.
status_defending_removal: Automatically at start of next turn.
sc_damage_glancing_desc: Damage equals the character's Toughness (margin 0). The character is Shaken but suffers no wounds.
sc_damage_solid_desc: One raise on the damage roll (margin 4+). The character is Shaken and suffers one wound.
sc_damage_shaken_on_shaken_title: Shaken While Already Shaken — Automatic Wound
sc_damage_shaken_on_shaken_desc: The character is already Shaken. A second Shaken result automatically inflicts a wound.
sc_damage_shaken_on_shaken_s1: Second hit — Shaken on top of Shaken
sc_damage_brutal_desc: Margin 8 = two raises = Shaken and two wounds from a single hit.
sc_soak_partial_desc: Hit with a raise, but the character spends a Benny and soaks one wound. Remains Shaken but wound-free.
sc_soak_clears_shaken_desc: Character is already Shaken. New hit, but all wounds are soaked — Shaken is removed (special SWADE rule).
sc_shaken_recovery_success_desc: At the start of their turn the character passes a Spirit check. Success removes Shaken and the character can act.
sc_shaken_recovery_fail_desc: Spirit check failed. The character remains Shaken and may only take free actions.
sc_shaken_benny_desc: The character spends a Benny to remove Shaken at any point in the round.
sc_incap_crit_fail_desc: Wounds exceed the maximum. Vigor roll — critical failure. Character dies.
sc_incap_crit_fail_s1: Another hit — exceeds max wounds, critical Vigor failure
sc_incap_bleeding_out_desc: Vigor roll failed (non-critically). The character is bleeding out.
sc_incap_stable_desc: Vigor roll succeeded. The character is stable but rolls on the Injury Table.
sc_bleeding_death_desc: The character is bleeding out. Vigor roll at start of turn fails — character dies.
sc_bleeding_stabilized_desc: Vigor roll with a raise — condition stabilizes.
sc_extra_dies_title: Extra Dies from the First Wound
sc_extra_dies_desc: Extras have a maximum of 1 wound. Any wound means death.
sc_extra_dies_s0: Hit with a raise against an Extra
sc_wc_survives_title: Wild Card Survives the Same Hit
sc_wc_survives_desc: Same damage, but a Wild Card takes a wound and stays in the fight.
sc_wc_survives_s0: Hit with a raise against a Wild Card
sc_stunned_cascade_desc: A Stunned character falls prone, becomes Distracted and Vulnerable. Cannot act.
sc_stunned_recovery_success_desc: Vigor roll succeeded. Stunned is removed, but the character remains Vulnerable until the end of the next turn.
sc_stunned_recovery_success_s4: End of next turn — Vulnerable expires
sc_stunned_recovery_raise_desc: Raise on the Vigor roll — Vulnerable is removed at the end of the current turn.
sc_distracted_outside_turn_desc: Character is Distracted between turns. The condition lasts until the end of their next turn.
sc_distracted_during_turn_desc: Character is Distracted during their own turn. The condition lasts until the end of the next turn.
sc_fatigue_progression_desc: Three fatigue levels: Fatigued (−1), Exhausted (−2), Incapacitated.
sc_fatigue_recovery_desc: Fatigue levels are removed one at a time.
sc_heal_wounds_desc: A successful Healing check reduces the number of wounds.
sc_heal_wounds_s0: Character takes 2 wounds and is Shaken
sc_heal_incap_desc: Healing at least one wound on an Incapacitated character brings them back into the fight.
sc_heal_incap_s1: Shaken on Shaken — Incapacitated, bleeding out
sc_hold_basic_desc: The character chooses not to act and goes on Hold.
sc_hold_interrupt_success_desc: A character on Hold interrupts another's action. Opposed Athletics check — success. Acts first.
sc_hold_interrupt_fail_desc: Athletics check failed. The character acts after the one they tried to interrupt.
sc_hold_persist_desc: The character does not act this round. Hold status carries over to the next round.
sc_prone_cycle_desc: Character drops prone (free action) and stands up (free action, −2 to Pace).
sc_restraint_entangled_desc: Character is Entangled (by a net, bonds, etc.). Vulnerable until freed.
sc_restraint_escape_entangled_desc: Strength or Athletics check — success. Character is freed, Vulnerable removed.
sc_restraint_bound_desc: Character is Bound. Can only attempt to escape.
sc_restraint_escape_bound_desc: Success = downgrade to Entangled. Raise = fully freed.
sc_grapple_grabbed_desc: Opposed Athletics check — success. Target is Grabbed and Vulnerable.
sc_grapple_pinned_desc: Raise on the grapple roll. Target is Pinned, Distracted, and Vulnerable.
sc_grapple_pin_from_grabbed_desc: Character already has the target Grabbed. A follow-up check pins them.
sc_grapple_escape_desc: From Pinned: success = Grabbed, raise = freed. From Grabbed: success = freed.
sc_blinded_recovery_desc: Vigor roll at end of turn. Raise removes full blindness; success reduces it one level.
sc_affliction_paralytic_desc: Character is paralyzed. Cannot recover from Stunned while the poison is active.
sc_affliction_weak_desc: Upon contracting the disease, the character immediately gains a fatigue level.
sc_affliction_lethal_desc: Immediately: wound + Shaken. If the timer expires — character dies.
sc_affliction_sleep_desc: A sleeping character cannot recover from Shaken or Stunned.
sc_affliction_sleep_s2: Attempt to recover from Shaken — Spirit success
sc_power_apply_dismiss_desc: Character activates an arcane power. The effect lasts several rounds or is dismissed early.
sc_power_backlash_desc: Critical failure while casting. All sustained powers instantly end and the character gains fatigue.
sc_defense_basic_desc: Character goes on Full Defense (+4 Parry). Lasts until the start of the next turn.
sc_defense_basic_s3: Start of next turn — defense removed
sc_fear_distracted_desc: Guts check failed. d20 roll = 5. Character is Distracted until the end of the next turn.
sc_fear_stunned_cascade_desc: d20 roll = 13. Character is Stunned (falls prone, Distracted, Vulnerable) and gains a scar.
sc_fear_stunned_cascade_s0: Fear Table roll: d20 = 13 — Stunned + scar
sc_fear_shaken_desc: d20 roll = 11. The character is Shaken with terror.
sc_fear_shaken_s1: Result: Shaken (equivalent to damage equal to Toughness)
sc_cross_full_round_desc: Hit → Shaken → start of turn → recovery (Spirit success) → act → end of turn. Full single-round cycle.
sc_cross_full_round_s1: Start of turn — Spirit success, Shaken removed
sc_cross_stun_shaken_both_ok_desc: Character is Stunned and Shaken. At start of turn Vigor (Stunned) and Spirit (Shaken) are checked independently. Both succeed.
sc_cross_stun_shaken_both_ok_s2: Start of turn — Vigor success, Spirit success
sc_cross_stun_shaken_vigor_ok_spirit_fai: Stunned + Shaken: Vigor OK, Spirit Fail
Vigor succeeds (Stunned removed), but Spirit fails — character remains Shaken.
Start of turn — Vigor success, Spirit fail
sc_cross_stun_shaken_vigor_fail_desc: Vigor fails — Stunned remains. Spirit check is skipped (blocked by Stunned).
sc_cross_stun_shaken_vigor_fail_s2: Start of turn — Vigor fail, Spirit success (ignored)
sc_cross_hold_broken_by_damage_desc: Character is on Hold. Enemy hits — Shaken. On Hold status is cleared.
sc_cross_entangled_persistent_vulnerable: Vulnerable Does Not Expire While Entangled
An Entangled character is Vulnerable with a permanent timer (99). Turns pass — Vulnerable remains. Escaping removes it.
Character is caught in a net
End of turn — Vulnerable timer frozen (Entangled)
sc_cross_bound_freezes_timers_title: Bound Freezes Distracted and Vulnerable Timers
sc_cross_bound_freezes_timers_desc: Character is Distracted, then Bound. Distracted timer does not tick on END_OF_TURN while Bound.
sc_cross_grapple_to_bound_desc: Grabbed → Pinned → APPLY_BOUND transitions to Bound, clears grappledBy.
sc_cross_lethal_plus_wounds_title: Lethal Poison on a Wounded Character
sc_cross_lethal_plus_wounds_desc: Character already has 3 wounds. Lethal poison adds a wound → exceeds maximum → Bleeding Out.
sc_cross_sleep_blocks_blinded_desc: A sleeping character is Blinded. Vigor check at end of turn does not apply — vision does not recover.
sc_cross_sleep_blocks_blinded_s3: End of turn — Vigor raise (blocked by sleep)
sc_cross_fatigue_incap_clears_all_title: Incapacitated by Fatigue Clears Bonds and Blindness
sc_cross_fatigue_incap_clears_all_desc: Character is Entangled and Blinded. Third fatigue level → Incapacitated → bonds and blindness cleared.
sc_cross_stun_breaks_defense_desc: Character is on Full Defense. Stunned → defense cleared.
sc_cross_progressive_damage_desc: Four rounds of combat: hits, recoveries, wounds accumulating to incapacitation.
sc_cross_progressive_damage_s0: Round 1: hit with raise — 1 wound, Shaken
sc_cross_progressive_damage_s5: Round 4: Shaken on Shaken → +2 wounds → exceeds maximum
sc_cross_heal_from_incap_desc: Character is Bleeding Out. Heal 1 wound → back to active. Heal remaining wounds.
sc_cross_heal_from_incap_s2: Heal 1 wound → back in the fight
sc_cross_hold_persists_rounds_desc: Character on Hold skips two rounds, then acts.
sc_cross_distracted_frozen_on_hold_title: Distracted Timer Does Not Tick While On Hold
sc_cross_distracted_frozen_on_hold_desc: Character is Distracted, goes On Hold. While on Hold timer does not tick. After acting — ticks normally.
sc_cross_distracted_frozen_on_hold_s3: End of round (On Hold → idle, timer does not tick)
sc_cross_backlash_chain_desc: Arcanist sustains 2 powers, already Fatigued. Backlash → all powers dropped, +1 fatigue → Exhausted.
sc_cross_fear_stun_cascade_desc: d20 = 13 on Fear Table → Stunned → prone + Distracted + Vulnerable. Attempt to recover.
sc_cross_fear_stun_cascade_s0: Fear Table roll: d20 = 13 → Stunned + mark of fear
sc_cross_fear_stun_cascade_s2: Start of turn — Vigor success, Stunned removed
sc_cross_wc_survives_heavy_hit_title: Wild Card Survives a Heavy Hit
sc_cross_wc_survives_heavy_hit_desc: Hit with margin 8 (two raises). Wild Card takes 2 wounds and is Shaken but stays in the fight.
sc_cross_death_race_title: Race Against Death — Series of Checks
sc_cross_death_race_desc: Character is Bleeding Out. Round 1: Vigor 1 — survived, still bleeding. Round 2: raise — stabilized.
sc_cross_defense_blocked_shaken_desc: A Shaken character cannot go on Full Defense.
sc_cross_defense_blocked_hold_desc: A character on Full Defense cannot go On Hold (holdUsed = true).
